title: Genie entity matching and SQL editor improvements
body:
* **More entity matching in Genie**: Genie can now support up to 60 entity matching (previously value dictionary) columns. See [Tune Genie Agent quality](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality).
* **Genie Space SQL editor fix**: Resolved an issued that caused the SQL editor in a chat window disappear if the user deleted the generated query. You can now use the editor to delete and rewrite queries.
